description_long: This is a modern ergonomic swivel chair with a high backrest and a sporty, racing-inspired design. The chair features a combination of black and orange upholstery, with the seat and backrest padded for comfort and contoured to support the body. The backrest includes two oval cutouts near the top, adding both visual interest and ventilation. The armrests are curved and padded, matching the color scheme of the seat and back. The chair sits on a five-star black base with casters for mobility and a central support column, likely adjustable for height. The overall appearance is sleek and professional, suitable for office, gaming, or urban workspace environments.
description: A black and orange ergonomic swivel chair with a high contoured back, padded armrests, and a five-star wheeled base. Features include oval cutouts in the backrest and a sporty, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the high backrest with two oval cutouts, padded seat, and armrests, highlighting the chair's ergonomic contours and color contrast.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the chair's curved back, thick seat padding, and the profile of the armrest, as well as the central support column and wheeled base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth black backrest with two oval cutouts and the full width of the armrests, emphasizing the chair's streamlined silhouette.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the seat's depth, armrest curve, and the structure of the base and support column.
attribute_central_support_column: A single black cylindrical metal column, likely telescoping for height adjustment, connecting the seat to a five-star wheeled base.
attribute_seat_back_design: Tall, contoured backrest with ergonomic shaping, two oval cutouts near the headrest, and a combination of black and orange synthetic leather upholstery.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, padded armrests attached to the seat sides, covered in matching black and orange material, with a fixed position.
